{{CargoRelic
|name=Centipede Potion
|class_id=20104
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The thousand-year centipede, with its formidable exterior and lethal poison, has become the subject of rumors about an elixir that grants immortality. As a result, numerous bounty hunters with varying levels of skill and immense courage have embarked on a perilous journey to find it.
|fame=15
|art=15
|fth=18
|civ=30
|tech=12
|ss1=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +1<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss2=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +2<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss3=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss4=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss7=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
